title: RSW Christmas 21 Piece Ribbon & Bow Set – 18 Red & Green Foil Bows with 3 x 7m Foil Ribbons – Festive Gift Wrapping Accessory Pack
features: COMPLETE GIFT WRAP SET – Includes 18 red and green foil bows and 3 rolls of matching foil ribbon (7m each)
TRADITIONAL FESTIVE COLOURS – Perfect for creating a bold, classic Christmas look under the tree
SHINY FOIL FINISH – Adds a sparkling, eye-catching touch to presents, hampers, and holiday projects
VERSATILE USE – Ideal for wrapping, decorating, and Christmas crafting projects
EASY TO USE – Pre-made bows and long ribbon rolls make wrapping quick, easy, and coordinated
description: Add a bold, festive finish to your gifts with the RSW 21 Piece Foil Ribbon & Bow Set in traditional red and green. This set includes eighteen pre-made bows in a mix of sizes and finishes, along with three rolls of coordinating foil ribbon, each approximately 7 metres long. Designed to bring sparkle and cheer to your Christmas wrapping, this set is perfect for anyone looking to create eye-catching and professional-looking presents. The foil material gives a shiny, vibrant finish that reflects light beautifully under the Christmas tree, making your gifts stand out. The pre-made bows are quick and easy to use, while the generous ribbon lengths allow for multiple uses – whether curling, tying, or layering for a more decorative effect. Ideal for gift wrapping, hamper decorating, and DIY festive craft projects, this ribbon and bow set is a versatile and cost-effective way to keep your gift presentation looking polished and cohesive this Christmas.
